roa.docketEntryComment: CONFIDENTIAL APD Motion to Review Mandatory Supervision
CONFIDENTIAL APD Motion to Review Mandatory Supervision

/CAL:SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC1170(H)(5)(B), A SPLIT SENTENCE/AJW/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/X:DEFENDANT IS APPEARING VIA ZOOM/DEF: IS SENTENCED ON COUNT 1 TO 8 MONTHS, ONE THIRD MID TERM, CONSECUTIVE TO SENTENCE IN COURT NUMBER 20010445/X:PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)(5)(B), THE SENTENCE IS TO BE SERVED AS FOLLOWS:/CH1:CJ 1 D/CTS:1/MANSUPCTS:2/CTW:7/MANSUP:BALANCE/MANSUP1/X:DEFENDANT TO COMPLETE 6 MONTHS AT RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT HENRY OHLHOFF RECOVERY PROGRAM/X:WHILE DEFENDANT IS AT THE PROGRAM, HE WILL BE ON ELECTRONIC MONITORING TO BE MONITORED BY APD AS A CONDITION OF HIS TERM IN THE HENRY OHLHOFFHOUSEAND MANDATORY SUPERVISION/X: IF HE SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETES THE PROGRAM, THE SENTENCE WILL BE DEEMED SERVED AND HE WILL REMAIN ON MANDATORY SUPERVISION,  IF HE DOES NOT COMPLETETHE PROGRAM SUCCESSFULLY, THE DEFENDANT AGRESS THAT 26 MONTHS IN CJ WILL BEIMPOSED,WHICH INCLUDES A CONSECUTIVE SENTENCE FROM CASE NUMBER 20010445/RX/DTC/IND/WS/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/11590/ /COLLECT/4019HALF/WEAP/CTORD:FORFEITURE OF SEIZED FUNDS IN THE AMOUNT OF $22,710,00/DISM3/

/CAL PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/X DISTRICT ATTORNEY IS APPEARING VIA ZOOM/TEXT DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: #1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 04-15-21/PPRF/ARBUCKLE/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/EMMOD:THE DEFENDANT IS NO LONGER REQUIRED TO BEON HOME DETENTION/X:THE DEFENDANT MUST REMAIN IN HIS PREMISES FROM 6PM -6AM/CONTD:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING OR DISPOSITION/DOPU:NO DISPOSITION/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:12-17-20/X:60TH DAY IS 01-02-21/987,2/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALLBE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/WEAP/RX/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/WS/CONTD:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE:90 MINUTES (3,5 HOURS COMBINED WITH 20010445)/
/CAL:APD MOTION TO REVIEW MANDATORY SUPERVISION/MO GRTD/OR/CTORD:ELECTRONIC MONITORING THROUGH APD IS TERMINATED/
/CAL:APD MTR FILING (MAND SUP)/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWINGREASON:PER REQUEST OF APD, APDTO NOTICE DEFENDANT/
/CAL:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING OR DISPOSITION/DTC/RX/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING OR DISPOSITION/DAWT/CONT/DOPU:NO DISPOSITION/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE IS RELIEVED FROM THIS CASE/STWPX/VD:12-03-20/CONT/DAWF/
/CAL:TS PRELIMINARY HEARING/LDPX:12-17-20/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
